nativePolicy: Recoverable state requires a native retry action; unrecoverable state makes retry props a type error and may compose explicit alternative actions.
Raw Error objects are not accepted; technical details render only from an explicit consumer-provided node behind a native details disclosure.
The visible named section is never a live region; polite/assertive modes require one concise announcement and enqueue it through the nearest ScreenReaderAnnouncer.Provider.
Retry, alternative actions, and technical details remain persistent and outside the provider-owned live roots.
The native retry button and details summary expose non-color hover, active, and focus-visible feedback, including reduced-motion and forced-colors fallbacks.
Retry, technical details, and live announcement enhancements are independently optional and each disappears with its related UI, behavior, events, and accessibility output.
